---
name: Improvement/Refactor
about: Propose a code improvement, refactor, or optimization
title: '[IMPROVE] '
labels: refactor
assignees: ''

---

## Component
- [ ] UI Optimization
- [ ] BFF Streaming Logic
- [ ] Service Layer (Acumatica)
- [ ] CSS / Styling

## Improvement Description
A clear and concise description of the code improvement or refactor.

## Why is this improvement needed?
Explain why this change is beneficial (e.g., performance, readability, scalability).

## Impact on Existing Code
- **Affected Files:** [e.g. services/acumatica.js, app/api/inventory/route.js]
- **Potential Regressions:** What could break during the refactor?

## Architectural Checklist
- [ ] Follows Streaming BFF pattern.
- [ ] Maintains separation between Service and API layers.
- [ ] Consistent with Vanilla CSS modularity.

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the improvement here.
